title: SourceLockRecord
description: Records a locked skill source at a specific commit under quarantine review. Phase 6 contract of RD2100 Agent Runtime v2.

record_id.description: Unique record identifier, format 'slr-NNN' (source lock record).

skill_name.description: Name of the skill being locked for review.

source_url.description: Canonical source URL (GitHub repo, skill hub, or user-provided path).

locked_commit_sha.description: Full 40-character SHA of the pinned commit.

cloned_to_quarantine_path.description: Absolute path to the quarantine directory where the repo was cloned.

cloned_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the clone was performed.

static_review_status.description: Current status of the Phase 6C static review checklist.

reviewer.description: Identifier of the reviewer (human or agent role) assigned to this skill.

gate_decision.description: Phase 6F gate decision for Phase 7 eligibility.

allowlist_entry_matched.description: Which allowlist entry matched the source URL (Phase 6A output).

branch_or_tag.description: Branch or tag name from which the commit was resolved.

quarantine_checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the quarantine repo/ directory post-clone, for integrity verification.

static_review_artifacts.description: Paths to Phase 6C review artifact files.

static_review_md.description: Path to the filled-out static review checklist.

tool_manifest_json.description: Path to the extracted tool declarations.

risk_report_md.description: Path to the overall risk assessment report.

checklist_results.description: Summary counts from the Phase 6C static review checklist.

total_checks.description: Total number of checklist items evaluated.

passed.description: Number of checklist items that passed.

flagged.description: Number of checklist items flagged for deeper review.

failed.description: Number of checklist items that failed.

critical_failures.description: List of C-codes (e.g., C3.4, C5.3) that failed critically.
